# RCM Cooperative Induction and Onboarding - checklist

*This issue should be created for each new RCM Cooperative Core Team member, or for a new partner who has discussed their potential engagement with or participation in the RCM Cooperative.*

The below is a complete list covering both core team and partner onboarding.
Please delete items which will not be relevant for this specific person or partnership.

## Equipment
- [ ] Working from home equipment
    - [ ] Laptop
    - [ ] Monitor
    - [ ] Peripherals (keyboard, mouse, camera, microphone)
    - [ ] Any other WfH equipment required (check eligibility for expenses)

## Meetings
- [ ] Project manager/onboarding meeting
- [ ] Set expectations for when we meet
    - [ ] 1:1 meetings
    - [ ] Weekly or fortnightly meetings
    - [ ] Informal chat opportunities (e.g. Collaboration Café, coffee chats)
- [ ] Invite to relevant recurring RCM Cooperative meetings and co-working sessions

## Comms and document space access
- [ ] Invite to RCM Cooperative Slack workspace
    - [ ] Add to relevant private channels
- [ ] Add to RCM Cooperative GitHub organisation
- [ ] Add to Google shared drive
- [ ] Confirm any other document locations to share (e.g. HackMD) — delete if not applicable

## Ecosystem introductions
- [ ] Introduce related Open Community projects in our ecosystem
    - [ ] Open Life Science
    - [ ] Hidden REF
    - [ ] The Turing Way

## Acknowledgement and website
- [ ] Add photo, front matter, and bio for the RCM Cooperative website (see [website README](https://github.com/rcmcooperative/rcmcooperative.github.io/blob/main/README.md#adding-a-new-member) for process)
- [ ] Add to README via all-contributors
- [ ] Request bio via bio issue template

## Reimbursement
- [ ] Confirm how this person will be reimbursed for any paid work undertaken on behalf of the cooperative (via OLS)
